name: Fujikawaguchiko
cityNote:
🚌 Red Line Bus — buy 1-day pass (¥1,500) or 2-day (¥2,000) at Kawaguchiko Station on arrival. No booking needed. Covers full Lake Kawaguchi loop incl. Oishi Park. Blue Line covers Saiko area.

📍 Fuji viewing spots nearby:
• Kawaguchiko Station — right outside, 2 min walk
• Lawson Town Office — lakeside reflections, ~10 min walk
• 7-Eleven Kodachi (3894-5) — classic konbini+Fuji shot, ~5 min walk
• Nikkawa Clock Shop — nostalgic backdrop, in town
• Tourist Base Kawaguchiko — rooftop views, ¥1,000/30 min
• Maison Lumière / Village Street — quiet streets, in town
• Nishiri Street Sankou — hidden alley, near above
• Gran Resort Princess — birdsnest house, check red line stop
• Oishi Park — already in plan (May 14 evening) ✓

activities.name: Bus: Shinjuku → Kawaguchiko
activities.notes: Keio or Fujikyu Highway Bus from Shinjuku Bus Terminal (Busta Shinjuku). ~2h direct but can take up to 2.5h with traffic — stay flexible with lunch timing.

activities.name: Red Line Bus to Houtou Fudou
activities.notes: 10 min · Red Line bus from Kawaguchiko Station toward Ropeway stop

activities.name: 🍴 Houtou Fudou
activities.notes: Famous local houtou (flat noodle miso stew) — the must-eat dish of Yamanashi. Great Mt Fuji views from the riverside branch.
activities.place: Houtou Fudou Kawaguchiko North Main Shop

activities.name: Red Line Bus to Panoramic Ropeway
activities.notes: 15 min · Red Line bus westbound to Kachi Kachi Ropeway stop

activities.name: Mt Fuji Panoramic Ropeway
activities.notes: Short gondola up Mt Tenjo. Stunning views of Mt Fuji and Lake Kawaguchi from the summit. Return by ropeway or hike down.
activities.place: Mt. Fuji Panoramic Ropeway, Fujikawaguchiko, Yamanashi, Japan

activities.name: Red Line Bus to Itchiku Kubota Museum
activities.notes: 15 min · Red Line bus northbound along the lake

activities.name: Itchiku Kubota Art Museum
activities.notes: Stunning kimono art museum on the lake shore. The architect's collection of Tsujigahana dyed silk kimonos is world-class.
activities.place: Itchiku Kubota Art Museum, Fujikawaguchiko, Yamanashi, Japan

activities.name: Red Line Bus to Oishi Park
activities.notes: 10 min · Red Line bus westbound to Oishi Park stop

activities.name: Oishi Park
activities.notes: Lakeside park — best spot on Lake Kawaguchi for Mt Fuji views, especially at golden hour. Mid-May = tulips & canola flowers (lavender blooms late June–July).

activities.name: Red Line Bus back to Hotel
activities.notes: 20 min · Red Line bus eastbound back to Kawaguchiko Station area

activities.name: ♨️ Hotel Koryu Onsen
activities.notes: ⚡ ADDED: Soak in the hotel's hot spring bath after a full day. Perfect wind-down before dinner.

activities.name: Train: Kawaguchiko → Fujiyoshida
activities.notes: 15 min · Fujikyu Railway from Kawaguchiko Station to Shimoyoshida Station, then 10 min walk up to the pagoda

activities.name: Chureito Pagoda
activities.notes: The iconic 5-storey pagoda with Mt Fuji behind it. 400 stone steps up — go early before crowds. 15-min train to Fujiyoshida.

activities.name: Train: Kawaguchiko → Kyoto
activities.notes: Primary: Bus to Mishima Station (~1h) → Shinkansen Hikari to Kyoto (~2h). Backup: Fujikyu to Otsuki → JR Chuo Line to Shinjuku → Shinkansen (longer, backtracks through Tokyo).
